name: Finance Knowledge Hub
description: Financial models, research, and market insights by Mohammad Wasim Shekh — a financial analyst who started in banking, mastered business analytics, and is building a career in finance.

hero.heading: How I think about markets, models, and money.
hero.subheading: A resume shows accomplishments. GitHub shows code. This site shows the thinking — financial models with documented assumptions, research, and honest notes on what I'm learning, from an analyst who started in banking, mastered analytics, and is building a career in finance.

cta.heading: Evaluating candidates for a finance or analytics seat?
cta.body: Spend ten minutes with the models and research here — assumptions, methodology, and lessons learned are documented on every piece. If the thinking holds up, my resume and inbox are one click away.

models.title: Financial Models
models.intro: Every model here was built from a blank workbook or an empty script. Each one documents the problem it answers, the assumptions behind it, the methodology step by step, and what I'd do differently next time.

research.title: Research
research.intro: Longer-form analysis — from AI-assisted financial document analysis to market and sector economics. Each piece states its question up front, shows its method, and cites its sources.

insights.title: Insights
insights.intro: Shorter observations on markets and finance — the patterns I notice while building models and reading filings. Less formal than research, but every claim still gets a number behind it.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: From a bank branch in Nepal to business analytics in New York — a financial analyst who believes the best way to understand a business is to model it.

resume.title: Resume
resume.intro: The one-page version of everything on this site. View it below or download the PDF.
resume.fallback: Your browser can't display embedded PDFs. Use the download button above to get the file.

notFound.title: Content not found
notFound.body: The item you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.

loadError.title: Something went wrong
loadError.body: This page couldn't load its content. If you're opening the files directly from disk, serve the folder with a local server (for example, VS Code Live Server) — browsers block fetch() on the file:// protocol.

footer.blurb: A knowledge hub of financial models, research, and market insights — built to show how I think, not just what I've done.
footer.note: Built with plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — no frameworks, no build step.
